scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && mvn package -f backend/pom.xml && mvn package -f syncer/pom.xml
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && mvn spotless:check -f backend/pom.xml && mvn spotless:check -f syncer/pom.xml
scripts.format: npm run lint -w frontend -- --fix && mvn spotless:apply -f backend/pom.xml && mvn spotless:apply -f syncer/pom.xml
